name: Double Rice Stuffing[for a 12-pound Turkey
recipeIngredient: 2 packages Long-grain & wild rice (6 oz each)
7 ounces (1 jar) Pimento-stuffed Olives, drained and sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the rice mix with 2 tablespoons of the butter or margarine and the 4 1/2 cups water, following label directions.
2. Sauté celery and onion in remaining butter until soft in a large frying pan; lightly stir in rice mixture, olives, salt, and pepper.
Makes approximately 10 cups or enough to stuff a 12-pound bird.
Source: Family Circle Illustrated Library of Cooking.
